---
title: "Robert Kimutai"
subtitle: "Curriculum Vitae"
author: "MSc Candidate – Environmental and Biosystems Engineering"
format:
  pdf:
    documentclass: article
    fontsize: 11pt
    mainfont: "Arial"
    geometry: margin=1in
    colorlinks: true
    linkcolor: blue
    keep-tex: true
    toc: false
    number-sections: false
    latex-engine: xelatex
    pdf-engine: xelatex
    header-includes: |
      \usepackage{enumitem}
      \setlist[itemize]{noitemsep, topsep=0pt}
---

# Contact Information

**Robert Kimutai**\
Nairobi, Kenya\
📧 robert.kimutai\@email.com \| 📞 +254 723 493 122\
🔗 [GitHub](https://github.com/robertkimutai) \| 🔗 [LinkedIn](https://linkedin.com/in/robertkimutai)

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Profile Summary

Resourceful and impact-driven graduate engineer with strengths in **irrigation**, **renewable energy**, **environmental systems**, and **embedded monitoring technologies**. Skilled in integrating field-level engineering with scientific data workflows using **R**, **Quarto**, and **Shiny**. Experienced in managing solar water infrastructure projects, designing sensor systems, and creating reproducible research outputs for development impact.

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Academic Background

**MSc – Environmental and Biosystems Engineering**\
*University of Nairobi* \| **2022 – Present**\
**Thesis:** *Development of a Low-Cost Solar Cooker Performance Evaluation System Integrated with Impact Analysis Using a Shiny Web Application*\
Focus: Irrigation Systems, Renewable Energy, Water Resources Engineering, Environmental Monitoring, Scientific Computing

**BSc – Agricultural Engineering**\
*JKUAT* \| **2013 – 2018**\
**Thesis:** *Automated Irrigation Scheduling System for Smallholder Farmers*

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Work Experience

### Graduate Researcher

*University of Nairobi*\
**2022 – Present**\
- Designed a sensor-integrated solar cooker evaluation system using ASAE S580.1 protocol.\
- Built a real-time performance dashboard with **Shiny** and **R**.\
- Conducted environmental and social impact analysis of solar cooking technologies.\
- Produced automated research reports using **Quarto** and **GitHub**.

### Clerk of Works – Water & Solar Infrastructure

*Smallholder Irrigation Value Addition Project (SIVAP), Kenya*\
**Feb 2022 – Mar 2023**\
- Supervised construction of earth dams, solarized boreholes, and fencing works.\
- Ensured contractor compliance with technical specs and timelines.\
- Oversaw installation of solar pumping systems, tanks, and water distribution.\
- Maintained progress reports and verified milestones for stakeholders.

### Sales Engineer – Irrigation & Solar Technologies

*Kupata Technologies Ltd, Nairobi*\
**May 2019 – Dec 2022**\
- Designed and sold solar water pumping and drip irrigation systems.\
- Performed technical site assessments and client training.\
- Developed proposals, layouts, and BOQs for smallholder and institutional clients.

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Core Competencies

-   ✅ Sustainable Infrastructure: Earth dams, solar water supply, irrigation systems\
-   ✅ Scientific Computing: R, tidyverse, ggplot2, Shiny, Quarto, Markdown\
-   ✅ Embedded Monitoring Systems: Arduino, BPW34, DS18B20, SD card logging\
-   ✅ Reproducible Research: Quarto reports, Zotero integration, GitHub workflow\
-   ✅ Field Supervision: Clerk of works, contractor coordination, inspection & reporting\
-   ✅ Socio-technical Impact Assessment: Community-focused evaluation tools

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Certifications

-   **Advanced Diploma in Data Science with R** – Alison, **2024**\
-   **Diploma in Machine Learning with R Studio** – Alison, **2023**\
-   **Statistical Data Analysis Using R** – RUFORUM, **2022**

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Tools & Technologies

| Category           | Tools & Platforms                                    |
|---------------------|---------------------------------------------------|
| Programming        | R, tidyverse, Shiny, Markdown                        |
| Reporting          | Quarto, Zotero, Git/GitHub                           |
| Hardware           | Arduino, BPW34, DS18B20, RTC, SD Module              |
| Engineering Tools  | AutoCAD (basic), QGIS, Proteus 8, LTspice            |
| Project Management | Clerk of works logs, BOQ validation, field reporting |

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Professional Affiliations

-   ✅ Registered Graduate Engineer – **Engineers Board of Kenya (EBK)**\
-   ✅ Graduate Member – **Institution of Engineers of Kenya (IEK)**

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## 📁 References

Available upon request.
